news.paragraph: Gold prices are showing resilience, edging higher as Treasury yields ease and maintaining stability despite recent surges in wholesale inflation and a rising dollar. While some strategists have expressed caution regarding gold's performance against inflation, high-profile investors continue to signal strong long-term optimism. Traders should monitor upcoming macro-economic data and US-China diplomatic developments for potential volatility.
